about.text:
About Our Warehouse Steps – Invotec Solutions
Price Match
We always aim to match and beat prices
Why Buy from Seltek
Dedicated products and service for UK Businesses
Need Help?
Call, Chat or Email our dedicated team
Volume discounts
Save? Need several items, buying in bulk
Free delivery
Free UK Mainland delivery on most items (Restrictions apply)
Business Services
B2B Business Services Public Sector & Business Accounts
Do you want to purchase mobile steps for your warehouse? Seltek Warehouse supplies a wide range of equipment for warehouses and commercial businesses. The products listed on our website have all been sourced from reputable suppliers with a proven track record of displaying high-quality products and acceptable delivery times.
Seltek is a B2B supplier, dealing directly with commercial and industrial businesses in the UK. We are proud that our clients have put trust in Seltek Warehouse to provide high-quality goods and services. There are over 2000 different products for you to choose from on our website, that includes storage equipment, mobile steps and material handling solutions.
We are your one stop shop for spring-loaded mobile warehouse steps, with a wide range of sizes to choose from. The spring-loaded steps are fitted with wheels or castors, that allows them to be moved easily. The wheels will then retract when weight is applied, so its not only accessible and convenient, but safe and secure. Our steps range from 2 to 6 steps, in various configurations. Mobile steps can be used in a huge variety of situations, in warehouses and commercial businesses. To see our range of mobile steps for warehouses, you can take a look at our
Warehouse Steps
page.
Seltek Warehouse has a team of real, experienced customer support advisors, that have knowledge and understanding of all products we supply. Many of these are trained engineers, and can speak to you about an idea or expand on a products specifications. Whilst we do have this sufficient website, we make over 50% of our sales through the customer service team.
Do you want to purchase warehouse steps for your commercial business? Get in touch with Seltek Warehouse on
+44 (0) 1908 320 731
. Alternatively, you can input all details into the mandatory fields of the form on our
Contact
page, and one of our customer support team will be in touch.

INVOTEC SOLUTIONS & SELTEK WAREHOUSE – CHRISTMAS CLOSURE NOTICE
Please note that Invotec Solutions, including Seltek Warehouse, will be closed from Wednesday, 24 December 2025, and will re‑open on Monday, 5 January 2026.
We would like to take this opportunity to thank our customers, distributors, and suppliers for your support throughout 2025, and we wish you a successful and healthy 2026.
Emails will be monitored during the closure period, and we will do our best to assist with any urgent issues.
Any orders placed during this time will be processed upon our return.
——————————————————————————————–
By Phone: +44 (0) 1908 322 282
By Fax: +44 (0) 1604 422 900
By Post: Invotec Solutions Limited, Unit 3 Deeping Gate, Stonebridge, Milton Keynes MK13 0DE
Email Us: Using The Form Below
Not in the UK? – We ship internationally, please contact us for a quote.
